steps: In a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube, add 2-7 volumes of DNA Binding Buffer to each volume of DNA sample (see table below). Mix briefly by vortexing. %s %s Zymo DNA Binding Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D4003-1-25
Transfer mixture to a provided Zymo-Spin™ Column in a Collection Tube.
Centrifuge for 30 seconds. Discard the flow-through.
Add 200 µl DNA Wash Buffer to the column. Centrifuge for 30 seconds. Repeat the wash step. undetermined Zymo DNA Wash Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D4003-2-6
Repeat the wash step. undetermined Zymo DNA Wash Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D4003-2-6

Add ≥ 6 µl DNA Elution Buffer or water directly to the column matrix and incubate at room temperature for one minute. Transfer the column to a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge for 30 seconds to elute the DNA. undetermined After starting with 1 ug DNA, typical yields are between 50-100 ng / uL Great recovery is 80%, typical recovery may be closer to 60%. Zymo DNA Elution Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D3004-4-1
creator: Alan Cone
